codeReview.summary: The bounds checking consolidation in ExtractUserAndText() is a clean, well-executed refactoring that improves code readability without changing behavior. The change replaces 4 separate len(args) >= 2 checks with a single hasArgs variable declared at the function start, making the code flow clearer and easier to maintain.

summary: Review passed. The fix successfully consolidates bounds checking in extraction.go ExtractUserAndText() by introducing a hasArgs variable at function start, replacing 4 scattered len(args) >= 2 checks. All 5 existing tests pass with race detection enabled. The code follows CLAUDE.md patterns and passes lint checks. No regressions or issues identified.
